text: Walking through these brightly lit, modern halls, I feel a surge of curiosity and anticipation. The vivid blue and orange glow from the R+D display suggests the promise of innovation and human ingenuity. The surroundings evoke a sense of futuristic openness, inviting me to contemplate how research and development shape the future. There is a quiet excitement in me—the world here feels like a canvas where ideas transform into reality.
